message:
Command `
# 4h20m CPU / ~69m elapsed. Still nominal.
# The monitor log only has 2 entries since 02:07 (hourly interval not working right?)
# Let me verify the monitor is alive
ps aux | grep monitor_full | grep -v grep
ps aux | grep drt_hourly | grep -v grep
ps aux | grep monitor_drt | grep -v grep
` executed with exit code -1.
